array.string: set -euo pipefail; STATE=/Users/josh/Developer/flywheel/.flywheel/state; REPORTS=/Users/josh/Developer/flywheel/.flywheel/reports; YMD=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d); SNAP="$STATE/jeff-corpus-activity-$YMD.json"; REPORT="$REPORTS/jeff-corpus-diff-$YMD.md"; if [[ -s "$REPORT" ]]; then printf 'idempotent skip: %s exists\n' "$REPORT"; exit 0; fi; /Users/josh/Developer/flywheel/.flywheel/scripts/jeff-daily-corpus-diff.sh --apply --json > "$STATE/.jeff-daily-collector-$YMD.json"; /Users/josh/Developer/flywheel/.flywheel/scripts/jeff-daily-corpus-diff-render.sh --apply --in="$SNAP" --out="$REPORT"
